title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 254.300 - Violation of chapter a misdemeanor
text:
254.300.  Violation of chapter a misdemeanor. — Any person who violates any of the provisions of this chapter or any of such rules and regulations shall be guilty of a misdemeanor.
(L. 1945 p. 672 § 22) 
Arson, reckless burning, 569.040 to 569.060 
Negligent burning or exploding, 569.065
